channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: FG, states, LGs get higher revenue as June allocation hits N2.55tn
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria’s FAAC allocation reached N2.55tn in June 2026, providing higher revenue for the Federal Government, states, and local councils. Learn more about t
Read More: https://punchng.com/fg-states-lgs-get-higher-revenue-as-june-allocation-hits-n2-55tn/

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos State Commissioner confirms Makoko waterfront reclamation project has full approval from both Federal and Lagos State Governments, addressing concern

item.title: US urges Nigeria to strengthen protection for christians, IDPs
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The US calls on Nigeria to intensify efforts to protect Christian communities from attacks and ensure the safe return of internally displaced persons.
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-urges-nigeria-to-strengthen-protection-for-christians-idps/

item.title: Kano gov unveils grassroots push for 2027 polls
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Kano State Governor Abba Yusuf launches a grassroots political engagement to strengthen his party’s structure ahead of the 2027 elections.

item.title: US Presses Nigeria To Better Protect Christians, Advance Security
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The United States Assistant Secretary of State for African Affairs, Frank Garcia, has concluded a visit to Abuja during which he pressed senior Nigerian government officials to increase efforts to protect Christian communities from attacks and accelerate the return of internally displaced persons to

item.title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken.”

item.title: How to remove white hard-water stains from bathroom tiles yourself
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The white layer that's covering your meant to be sparkling bathroom tiles can be irritating for house owners. They are known as limescale deposits and are caused by the high concentration of calcium and magnesium carbonate that accumulates in the evaporation of water with a high mineral content. T

item.title: WHO, UNICEF Alarmed As 13.5 Million Children Miss Lifesaving Vaccines
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) and the United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) have raised concerns after an estimated 13.5 million children missed all routine vaccinations during their first year of life in 2025, despite a modest recovery in global immunisation coverage after the COVID-1

item.title: Strait of Hormuz: ‘You better behave, I don’t like setting deadlines’ -Trump warns Iran
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: United States President, Donald Trump, has issued another stern warning to Iran over the Strait of Hormuz. Trump gave the warning on Wednesday when he arrived at Pennsylvania to address the Defense and Innovation Summit, saying Iran should ‘better behave’ He stated that Iran un

item.title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023. Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to mimic the movements you were making in real life. You could also run around with people on the call in a sha

item.title: Ganduje stresses need for ideology-based politics
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Abdullahi Ganduje has called for ideology-based political parties, saying stronger party ideologies will deepen Nigeria’s democracy. The post Ganduje stresses need for ideology-based politics appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to see how Nolan uses cutting-edge filmmaki

item.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

item.title: US military to test soldiers aged 30 and above for low testosterone
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced Wednesday that military personnel age 30 and older will undergo testing for testosterone deficiency as part of annual health screenings. The post US military to test soldiers aged 30 and above for low testosterone appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Court orders Taraba ADC, INEC to recognise Madaki as state constituency candidate
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Federal High Court sitting in Jalingo, Taraba State, has declared Umar Suleiman Madaki as the lawful candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) for the Jalingo I state constituency ahead of the forthcoming election. Justice Mashkur Salisu delivered the judgment on Wednesday in

item.title: Full list: EFCC secures forfeiture of 48 properties linked to Malami
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has secured the final forfeiture of 48 properties linked to former Attorney-General of the Federation and Minister of Justice, Abubakar Malami (SAN), to the Federal Government. The post Full list: EFCC secures forfeiture of 48 properties linked to

item.title: 5 simple steps to create drip irrigation bottle for your home garden
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: A successful home garden can be challenging to manage, requiring a balancing act of time, effort and water management. It's a challenge for many urban farmers and plant enthusiasts to resist the urge to waste precious water or soar utility costs by keeping plants hydrated. The post 5 simple steps t

item.title: Tinubu to attend UN General Assembly in September
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Nigeria’s Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Ambassador Jimoh Ibrahim, announced that President Bola Tinubu will be attending the United Nations General Assembly in New York this September. Ambassador Ibrahim made this statement on Wednesday after meeting with President Tinubu and

item.title: Police arrest content creator over alleged rape, death of woman in Delta
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Content creator Ifeanyi Ogbonna, popularly known as “Odogwu of Asaba,” has been arrested in connection with the alleged rape of a 20-year-old woman in a hotel in Delta State’s capital, who later died. The woman reportedly committed suicide by ingesting a toxic substance after making a video in which

item.title: Thieves attempt to break into Yamal’s home in Barcelona during France match
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: An attempted break-in targeted the Barcelona home of Spanish football star Lamine Yamal in the early hours of Wednesday morning, occurring shortly after Spain's triumph over France in the World Cup semi-finals. The post Thieves attempt to break into Yamal’s home in Barcelona during France matc

item.title: England and Argentina national anthems drowned out
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Both England and Argentina's national anthems are drowned out by crowd noise, before the teams kick off their 2026 World Cup semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium.

item.description: The organiser of the Big Brother Naija, has announced date for the 2026 edition of the show. N160 million is the highest grand prize in the histor

item.title: INEC registers 2.4 million voters as Kano leads nationwide CVR exercise
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) has revealed that 2,436,275 Nigerians have successfully completed the Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) exercise as of July 10, 2026, with 823,324 applicants registering online and 1,612,951 completing their physical registration at its centres

item.title: FG evacuates 1,490 Nigerians from South Africa over xenophobic attacks
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Federal Government has completed the fifth phase of its voluntary evacuation of Nigerians affected by xenophobic attacks and related security concerns in South Africa, bringing the total number of citizens evacuated to 1,490. The latest evacuation flight, operated by Air Peace, arrived at the Mu

item.description: Nigeria’s three tiers of government, comprising the federal government, states and local government councils, shared a significant total sum of N2.550 trillion in June 2026 Federation Account revenue. The director of the Office of the Accountant General of the Federation, Bawa Mokwa, disclosed

item.dc:creator: Leadership

The Nigerian women’s team confirmed its status as one of the tour

item.title: France's parliament adopts assisted dying law
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: France on Wednesday moved closer to joining the ranks of countries that guarantee the right to assisted dying, a move championed by President Emmanuel Macron. Macron had promised an assisted dying law when he was re-elected for a second term in 2022, in a change seen as one of the most important soc

item.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

item.title: World Cup: Spain becomes fourth country in history to reach final conceding one goal
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Spain on Tuesday became the fourth country in the history of the FIFA World Cup to reach a final, conceding just one goal. The La Roja conceded just one goal against Belgium in the quarter-final stage, before reaching the final, thanks to a 2-0 win against France. The other countries to achieve this

item.title: US reports ‘wave of strikes’ on Iran as war returns
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The United States launched a wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday, after it reimposed a naval blockade in a return to war between the two foes. Nearly a month after they signed a memorandum of understanding aimed at ending the Middle East war, the two sides resumed fighting with strikes on targ

item.title: 2027: PDP will resist electoral malpractice in Gombe — Pantami
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Gubernatorial candidate of the main opposition People’s Democratic Party (PDP) in Gombe State, Prof. Isa Ali Pantami, has warned that his party will not condone any form of electoral malpractices or manipulation. Ali Pantami gave the warning on Wednesday while addressing his teeming PDP members and

item.description: The assets include a gold wedding ring, a gold chain with a cross pendant, an iPhone 12 Pro Max, a Lexus RX350 SUV, and a one-storey building comprising six room-and-parlour self-contained apartments located along the Emedu–Awoyaya axis of Ajah, Lagos. item.title: FG Sets Up Panel On Electricity Market Decentralisation
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Federal Government has inaugurated a nine-member inter-agency committee to address emerging policy, regulatory and operational issues arising from the decentralisation of Nigeria’s electricity market. This, according to the FG, is aimed at ensuring a seamless transition to a more efficient

item.title: US launches ‘wave of strikes’ on Iran, Tehran threatens to halt regional energy exports
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The US military on Wednesday launched rare daytime attacks on Iran, including a 90-minute wave of strikes, as it reimposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports. Tehran responded with strikes on “US military targets” in Gulf states and threatened to halt energy exports in the region.

item.title: Preliminary statements against ANC for the Afrophobia and xenophobia attacks, By Ahmed Aminu-Ramatu Yusuf
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: I totally recognise that the seeds for the current Afrophobia and xenophobia were on ground before 1994. Nevertheless, Nelson Mandela, Thabo Mbeki, Jacob Zuma, and Cyril Ramaphosa, along with their White masters, were/are the ones who have been successively planting, watering, fertilising, harvestin

item.title: State police funding must be first-line charge – Bamidele
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Leader of the Senate, Senator Opeyemi Bamidele, Wednesday, provided further details on how the proposed state police services would be insulated from the abuse of some political actors and their funding should be a first-line charge in the ongoing amendment to the 1999 Constitution.

item.title: Kun Khalifat Strengthen Squad With Enyimba, Niger Tornadoes Midfielders
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Kun Khalifat of Owerri have confirmed the arrival of Enyimba of Aba midfielder, Hogan Umoh as well as Chima Deruo, also a midfielder from Niger Tornadoes of Minna, Completesports.com reports. The Pride of Imolites also confirmed they have signed Bendel Insurance of Benin centre-back, Preye Seikrowei

item.title: Kogi organises search for abducted NECO candidates
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Governor Ahmed Ododo has ordered a multi-agency security operation involving the military, police, DSS and local security outfits to rescue four people abducted during the ongoing NECO examination in Dekina LGA. The post Kogi organises search for abducted NECO candidates appeared first on Premium Ti

item.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

item.title: Just In: ‎BBNaija Season 11 Premieres July 26 With ₦160m As Grand Prize
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎ Africa’s biggest reality television show, Big Brother Naija, returns for its highly anticipated Season 11 on Sunday, 26 July 2026, on DStv and GOtv. ‎The launch show will air from 7 PM on Africa Magic Showcase and Africa Magic Family channels, with the 24-hour show on DStv channel 198

item.title: Why I Left Google DeepMind
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://turntrout.com/why-i-left-google-deepmind Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48925271 Points: 160 # Comments: 82

item.title: Tinubu Hails Osoba As ‘Brother In Purpose’ on birthday
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has paid glowing tribute to former Ogun State Governor and elder statesman, Aremo Chief Olusegun Osoba, describing him as “a brother in purpose” whose life has been defined by service, integrity and unwavering commitment to good governance. In a birthday message iss

item.title: Enshittification
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Bryan, a food broker from Michigan, wasn't sure if he'd be able to make it to urgent care in time. He started feeling off on Thursday, and by Saturday, he was having to use the bathroom every 15 to 30 minutes. "It's no joke about the explosive diarrhea," Bryan, who asked that his last name […]

item.title: US intelligence director pick refuses to acknowledge Trump loss in 2020
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Jay Clayton, often in circuitous fashion, avoided saying Joe Biden won 2020 race during his confirmation hearing.

item.title: College Seeks Policy Reforms To Expand Consultancy Pharmacists’ Roles
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The West African Postgraduate College of Pharmacists (WAPCP), Nigeria Chapter, has called for comprehensive policy reforms to expand the clinical responsibilities of consultant pharmacists across Nigeria’s healthcare system, saying the move is critical to improving patient outcomes, reducing m

item.title: Weak party ideology fuelling defections — Ganduje
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Ganduje said strengthening internal democracy and promoting issue-based politics would deepen Nigeria’s democratic culture and restore public confidence in the political process. The post Weak party ideology fuelling defections — Ganduje appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: We successfully uploaded our candidates’ names before INEC deadline — LP
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Labour Party says it uploaded its presidential and vice-presidential candidates’ names before the INEC nomination deadline. The post We successfully uploaded our candidates’ names before INEC deadline — LP appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.
